reference_goals: Cell carrier tray — cell pocket geometry, compression pads, spacing
Busbar and interconnect — welded/bolted tab routing, current path
BMS integration — sensing harness channel, voltage tap, thermistor pocket
Thermal interface — cold plate contact zone, thermal pad recess, leak channel
Enclosure — sealed lid, vent path, service disconnect, isolation end plates
Safety features — fuse/pyro-disconnect, warning label zone, crash structure
needed_metadata: BOM — cell format (cylindrical/prismatic/pouch), busbar material, enclosure material
Cell arrangement — series/parallel config, nominal voltage/capacity
Assembly sequence — cell insertion, busbar install, lid seal, harness connect
needed_engineering_docs: Thermal boundary — cell heat generation rates, coolant flow/temp
Structural boundary — crush load cases, vibration spectrum (GRMS)
Electrical boundary — isolation test voltage, current interrupt response
safety_boundary: No-live-energy training reference module; no cell chemistry recipes, charging algorithms, or BMS firmware.

crawl_targets.search: battery pack module cell carrier STEP
